emails.subject: Blood Bank
emails.body: Blood Bank Mark, Any further thoughts on the blood bank concept? Please, let me know if I can be helpful? Vince

emails.subject: RE: Blood Bank
emails.body: RE: Blood Bank Vince, I must apologize. I have not had time to look over the proposal in any detail. When I first spoke with your friend, it was apparent that he was still pre-business plan stage. He has since sent me some ideas and information. I think the concept has merit, but there are so many political issues that I am concerned about the ultimate business viability. Give me the weekend to look over the information. Thanks, Mark To: Mark Lay/HOU/ECT@ENRON

emails.subject: RE: Blood Bank
emails.body: Mark, Thanks. Vince To: Mark Lay/HOU/ECT@ENRON
